scripts.dev:split: concurrently -n web,api,search -c magenta,green,blue "env VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://localhost:${API_PORT:-5003} npm run dev --workspace @estateflow/web" "env API_PORT=${API_PORT:-5003} npm run dev --workspace @estateflow/api" "npm run dev:search"
scripts.dev:search: cd apps/search-service && ([ -x .venv/bin/python ] || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PYTHON_SEARCH_PORT:-8002} --reload
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @estateflow/web && npm run build --workspace @estateflow/api
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && env NODE_ENV=production API_PORT=${API_PORT:-5003} npm run start --workspace @estateflow/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @estateflow/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @estateflow/api
